blocks.text: You are analyzing the Noble Nest Academy Laravel application. Your job is to: 1) Identify the project purpose and domain, 2) Critically analyze the current codebase state, 3) Identify all gaps, missing features, incomplete code, and dead code, 4) Identify the best tools and libraries to use, 5) Create a prioritized, actionable production-ready completion plan. Be thorough. Read the key files: app/Models/, app/Services/, app/Http/Controllers/, app/Jobs/, routes/web.php, config/features.php, services/curriculum-ai/, database/migrations/. Focus on actual code quality, security, performance, and production readiness. Output a structured report.
